data.name: Special Request: Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
Special Request: Chapter 1 — The Invitation is the beginning of a psychological story about power, control, and corruption.
Nothing resolves in this chapter. It only begins.
This is not a fast-paced adult game. It’s a psychological descent built over time.
If you’re looking for immediate adult content, this chapter will likely feel slow.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ABOUT THE STORY

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

One impulsive mistake changes everything. What starts as a private incident quickly becomes leverage in someone else’s hands.

The only person who offers help is an influential associate of the mayor. He offers to fix things. The cost just isn’t visible at first.

It sounds simple. It never is.

Every favour comes with weight. Every solution creates dependency. And every step pulls her deeper. Soon, anonymous warnings begin to surface. Questions appear — without answers.

Laura is introduced to PAM — a company that needs a public face. She accepts because it feels like the safest option. At first, it looks like a professional opportunity.

But expectations begin to shift. Requests become patterns. Patterns become obligations. And her public image becomes harder to separate from the organisation behind it.

Outside of work, pressure builds. Her marriage begins to crack. Trust starts to erode. And control becomes harder to define.

Your choices determine how Laura responds.

Through the Pure / Corrupt psychological system, decisions shape her perception, unlock different scenes, and influence which relationships — and which truths — become available.

Each chapter tells its own part of the story — but your choices persist across the entire four-part narrative.

Chapter 1 sets the foundation. The consequences come later.

The invitation is only the beginning.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FEATURES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• First chapter of a four-part psychological thriller visual novel

• Decisions and psychological alignment persist across chapters

• A grounded narrative centred on reputation, protection, and dependency

• Meaningful choices that unlock different narrative paths

• Atmospheric visuals presented in a realistic cinematic style

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This visual novel contains mature themes, including erotic tension, psychological pressure, adult relationships, and explicit sexual content.

Sexual content develops gradually and is tied to character psychology and choices, rather than to standalone scenes.

All characters are 18 or older.

data.short_description: Power, control, and corruption shape every decision. After one impulsive mistake, Laura becomes entangled with a man who can erase problems — but every choice pulls her deeper.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics (Intel HD or equivalent)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Runs on most systems; low performance requirements.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2.4 GHz Quad Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU recommended but not required
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 High Sierra or newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Intel or Apple Silicon (Rosetta 2)
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 Big Sur or newer
  • 處理器: 2.4 GHz Quad Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated GPU or higher
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics (Intel HD or equivalent)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
  • Additional Notes: Runs on most systems; low performance requirements.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: 2.4 GHz Quad Core
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated GPU recommended but not required
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any

Minimum:
  • OS: macOS 10.13 High Sierra or newer
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
  • Additional Notes: Intel or Apple Silicon (Rosetta 2)
